textByHash.49eb49a782aaa67aaaee5805be50058ea7a33b81: As official tailor for Kourend, I can recolour this clothing, allowing adventurers to represent the city to which they are most loyal.
textByHash.58f38f0df249a9d02aa283487844e9c846a44450: If you are interested, I would be more than happy to offer my tailoring services in exchange for Marks of Grace.
textByHash.8119e3174f84b2c93fa9c45926df370fcfd07b45: I can remove that item's colours free of charge. Alternatively I can recolour it to represent a city of Kourend for a fee of 15 Marks of Grace.
textByHash.88e3b8f41e01a9b0002c06aec1325c8a20da319b: Welcome, traveller. Are you looking to represent one of the houses of Great Kourend?
textByHash.8d90e2afbc0c4c21340ce728a1db718963a2d16f: Oh, certainly. My assistant over there, Robyn, will be happy to help you.
textByHash.9eb3ec31a72e31d29e2d03b33a159b65fcfe7ad0: Which city would you like to represent?
textByHash.b10c556630e35fc15065650841a5868011409abf: As you are probably aware, Great Kourend is a vast kingdom. Many adventurers choose to wear special clothing which allows them to explore swiftly and with elegance.
textByHash.cf4c9c90c714c14f656948d620a966309d7ae302: Are you sure you want to revert that piece of clothing? You'll have to pay again if you want it recoloured.
textByHash.d2e3ddf8418f762adaa4201bbf01cd10730a6cb1: Fantastic, simply pass me the items of clothing you would like recoloured, and we can get started.
textByHash.dcbe46596bcf70c3a817be47307aaf769880b7b7: Sorry, you don't appear to have enough Marks of Grace. I charge 15 for my services.
textByHash.e5a56d4386761fb715bc24a2af75271b7914e4f2: Are you sure you want to recolour that piece of graful clothing? It will cost 15 marks of grace.
